main.description: A verifiable link between an ATProto DID and an EVM wallet address, proven via an EIP-712 typed data signature. Designed for cross-chain identity linking with support for EOA wallets.

chainId.description: EVM chain ID that was used for the signature (e.g. 1 for Ethereum mainnet, 8453 for Base). This does not restrict the scope of the identity link to that chain; the identity applies across all EVM-compatible chains, since the signature proves ownership of the EOA which can be used on all those chains.

signature.description: EIP-712 typed data signature produced by the wallet (hex-encoded).

message.description: The EIP-712 structured message fields that were signed.

signatureType.description: Signature verification method. Determines how a verifier should check the signature.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.

eip712Message.description: The EIP-712 typed data message that was signed by the wallet. Contains the fields binding an ATProto DID to an EVM address on a specific chain.

did.description: The ATProto DID being linked to the EVM address.

evmAddress.description: The EVM wallet address (must match the top-level address field).

chainId.description: EVM chain ID as string (bigint serialized).

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the attestation was created (bigint serialized).
